ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method used to ship the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse from which the order is shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-category the product belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered on the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit, a unique code for each product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in kilograms */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date the product was manufactured */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product (if applicable) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the sub-category belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Supplier rating based on performance and reliability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse in terms of the number of items */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the warehouse */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse storing the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the sale belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold in the sale */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the product */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
